prompt: Create a full-body vertical fashion portrait of an elegant gothic lolita young woman standing in a dark Victorian room, facing the camera with a graceful doll-like pose, one hand lightly holding out the skirt and the other relaxed at her side. She wears an elaborate black-and-royal-blue aristocratic gothic lolita dress with gold embroidery, a fitted corset bodice with crisscross gold lacing, long flared sleeves, white lace cuffs, a high white ruffled collar, a large satin blue bow at the neck with a jeweled brooch, and a second large blue waist bow with dangling gold tassels. The skirt is dramatic and layered: black outer overskirt with ornate gold filigree trim, deep royal-blue ruffle tiers, translucent pale-blue lace layers, and white lace edging, forming a high-low bell silhouette. Add black floral lace thigh-high stockings, black glossy platform Mary Jane shoes with buckles, and delicate gold jewelry. Her hair is dark brown wavy twin-tail hair, decorated with exactly 4 visible head accessories: a small tilted black top hat with a blue band, a black lace veil, a cluster of blue roses, and gold filigree hair ornaments. Use a refined color palette of black, deep royal blue, antique gold, and white lace. The setting is an ornate gothic Victorian interior with exactly 6 prominent decor elements: a carved black-and-gold cabinet on the left, lit silver candelabras with candles, dark blue roses in a vase, heavy navy velvet curtains, a tall arched leaded-glass window on the right, and a small black-and-gold side table holding a blue rose. Add a patterned blue-and-gold rug on a dark floor. Lighting should be moody candlelit chiaroscuro with cool window light, rich shadows, luxurious textures, ultra-detailed fabric, realistic photography, sharp full-body composition, vertical 9:16 framing. Include the visible white watermark text Pollo.ai in the top-right corner. Do not add extra people, extra text, modern objects, or a visible face blur; keep the face naturally rendered if possible.
